# Rohit Raj — Founding Engineer & AI Systems Architect

> Backend engineer with 6+ years experience building production AI systems, distributed architectures, and mobile apps for startups. Based in India, available worldwide.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://rohitraj.tech/en): Portfolio overview with AI projects and reliability engineering

- [Services](https://rohitraj.tech/en/services): Engineering services offered
- [Engineering Notes](https://rohitraj.tech/en/notes): 32 technical case-study posts

## Featured Projects

- [MicroItinerary](https://rohitraj.tech/en/projects/microitinerary): AI travel planner with GPT-4 destination recommendations
- [StellarMIND](https://rohitraj.tech/en/projects/stellarmind): Chat-to-SQL with pgvector and Spring AI MCP server
- [MyFinancial](https://rohitraj.tech/en/projects/myfinancial): Privacy-first personal finance advisor PWA

- Agentic AI Development
- Custom Text-to-SQL Systems (RAG + pgvector)

- WhatsApp Business API Integration
- On-Device AI (Gemma, LiteRT, offline-first architectures)
